info.title: Click Intern Core API
info.description: Internal platform API for internship tracking, assessments, and administration

example: password must be longer than or equal to 6 characters

comment.example: Strong progress in hooks and composition

phone.description: Phone in E.164 format. Send empty string or "null" to clear value.

removePhoto.description: Set true to remove current photo. Cannot be combined with photo file in same request.

photo.description: Profile photo. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Max size: 5MB.
